title: 12 Pack Multi-Purpose Bottle and Jar Opener Grip Pads - 5.5” Round Non-Slip Kitchen Gripper for Lids, Cans and Medicine Bottles - 2-in-1 Coaster and Opener - by Bigleef
description:
About this item
Multi-Purpose Non-Slip Gripper: Whether you’d like to open jars with ease or keep your cups from sliding across the table - these handy 5.5” non slip gripper pads are perfect for hands of every size and any age.
Weak Hands? Arthritis? Our grippers are designed to be the ideal home and kitchen tool to help the elderly or those with hand conditions open cans, jars and medicine bottles with less effort and discomfort.
Heat Resistant Cup Coaster: Place under mugs, bowls, plates, cups and more to keep your kitchen tidy and prevent unwanted slippage. Our gripper pads are also heat resistant and can be used as a trivet under pots.
Add Some Grip Around The House: Use under a floor rug, door mat, knife block or small appliance - anywhere you need some added traction! Garage, office, or on any table, desk, cupboard, shelf, or counter in your home.
Love It Or Your Money Back: At BigLeef we pride ourselves in providing quality products that help conquer life’s little problems. We’re confident you’ll be satisfied with your purchase, but if you have any issues, please let us know!
reviews_5s:
Works very wellThese jar openers are thicker than ones I've been using! Takes less effort to open items. Really like that !! They are also bright colors easy to find in my messy drawer! Good deal for my money !The grippers look flimsy but actually work well. They strongly work to hold an item as well as making lids easy to turn. It is actually a great price for them.This particular set is holding up and lasting extremely well. They have an exceptional gripping surface and are the perfect size.I keep these grip pads in every room in my house, in my car and in the garage. There are so many times I have been grateful to have them handy. The colors make these easy to find. So convenient!I've known about the trick of using rubber gloves to open recalcitrant lids for years. These simplify the process and are easy to clean.Love theseYou should know, however, instead of receiving one pack of 12 we received 12 packs of 12. Of course you know that’s not what we ordered. But thanks.I bought this for opening jars but found another use for them. Works great, no more burned fingers.These come in handy for opening jars, and opening/closing faucets. I also use them under things that I don't want to slip around - like under the cutting board on kitchen counter, or under soap dishes. So glad I found these here on Amazon. They seem to be a quality item. Nice colors too.

Multi-Purpose Bottle and Jar Opener Grip Pads
reviews_1s: They do not grip anything.Product doesn't work for intended use. Seller shipped fast.They don't work. Buy real ones, these are so thin.
